summary.method: substring-match seed terms against chatgpt titles + cc first_user_msgs, top 30 co-occurring tokens per cluster after stopword + path-noise + scaffold filter
coverage + pairwise term-overlap distinctness matrix + short-seed substring warnings + deterministic 5-sample FP eyeball per channel, HOTL gate
substring_warnings_flagged: audio_music seed 'stem' matched 'system'/'ecosystem' in chatgpt titles
productivity_skills seed 'fest' matched 'manifesting'/'lifestyle' in chatgpt titles

summary.method: Join cluster.portfolio_hits against fs_temporal by (name, surface). Bucket ctime + mtime into 4 eras. No re-classification; Phase 2 is authoritative.

seq_04b_era_4_now_matrix_bonus.note: Not a listed Phase 3 sequence; computed at merge time so era_cluster_matrix.json is self-consistent and Phase 4 can look up Era 4 ship events.

summary.shape: cluster -> channels {chatgpt, cc, fs_ctime, fs_mtime} -> era_label -> count/samples/items
headline_findings_eyeball: anatomy is purely Era 3+ (0,0,11,2 on CC; 0,0,4,0 on fs_ctime) — no Pre-CC presence at all.
web_extract has no ChatGPT chatter before Era 3 build (1,0,0,0); ship-first, talk-after.
audio_music has 89 ChatGPT items in Era 1 + 89 in Era 2 (sustained), but only 2 fs_ctime ships in Era 2 and 2 in Era 3 — long talk, slow ship.
atlas_core fs_ctime stages 3->7->11 across Era 1->Era 3, matching steady build narrative.
audio_music CC=262 in Era 2 is likely inflated by 'stem'/'system' substring false positives (Phase 2 warning) — Phase 4 should sample-verify before treating it as ship signal.
productivity_skills CC=27 in Era 3 is likely inflated by 'fest'/'manifesting'/'lifestyle' substring false positives — same caveat.

summary.method: Aggregate ship_flow.json + era_cluster_matrix.json + clusters_final.json into a human-readable narrative. Hard rule: every finding cites a specific record (convo_id, session_id, path, or item name). Where evidence is title-language only, finding says so. No claims about convo body content.
sections: 1 Era x cluster heatmap (chatgpt, cc, fs_ctime per cluster x era; era totals)
2 Channel-flow patterns (pattern dist, idea_via dist, cluster_fallback anchor collapse, items per cluster)
3 Counter-narrative findings (F1-F9, each grounded with >=5 spot-check records where applicable)
4 Open questions for follow-up (10 items, structural gaps)
5 What this report does NOT claim
summary.spot_check_records_per_finding: 5+ for F1, F2, F4, F5, F6, F8, F9 (with explicit convo_ids and item names); F3 quotes 6 sample titles; F7 names both no_talk items with provenance

phases_005.next_action: Audit done. AUDIT_FINDINGS.md written with verdicts on 7 cluster anchors (4 REJECT, 2 WEAK, 1 ACCEPT-but-late) + 5 spot-checked name_match anchors (1 REJECT, 4 ACCEPT). Section 7 contains full Phase 1-5 re-run plan (option A) with corrected rules. Awaiting Bruke's call: (A) full re-run, (B) Phase 4-only re-run, or (C) annotate-and-park.

phases_rerun_v2.method: Weapon-mode 11-task execution against the audit findings. Replaced literal substring rule with word-boundary regex (re.search(rf'(?<![a-z0-9_]){re.escape(s)}(?![a-z0-9_])', text)) across all 4 phase scripts + portfolio cluster assignment in seed_clusters.py. Lifted Phase 1 first_user_msg cap 200->2000. Lifted Phase 2 validator 2000-item scan cap. Switched Phase 4 FP_RISK_CLUSTERS to dynamic load from validator output. Dropped substring-FP seeds (stem, fest, scrape, fractal, comfyui, perception, mode names). Added explicit forms for word-boundary requirements (mandelbulb3d, mandelbulber2, m3p-to-fract, fractal-machine, etc).

accept_but_late_unchanged: 316 (4 anatomy items, still post-dates ship ctimes)

phases_rerun_v2.side_effect_caught_and_fixed_during_reru: Initial v2 run with mode names still in atlas_core seeds collapsed 15 items onto convo 6152 'USAA Thanksgiving Closure Notice' via seed 'closure'. Mitigated by dropping RECOVER/CLOSURE/MAINTENANCE/COMPOUND/SCALE from seeds.
phases_rerun_v2.open_questions_for_v3: See CORPUS_MAP_v2.md Section 4. 7 OQs: anatomy negative-lag persists, v2 anchors unaudited, portfolio-membership diff verification, generic seeds remain (audio, midi, etc), wasp/insect, atlas_core CC inflation, expanded null idea_via cohort.

audit_phases_1_through_4.method: Mechanical count verification of every phase artifact against _progress.json. Semantic verification: read 7 cluster_fallback anchor convo bodies from services/cognitive-sensor/memory_db.json + 5 spot-check name_match anchors.
audit_phases_1_through_4.headline: Mechanical: PASS (no miscounts). Semantic: 4 of 7 cluster anchors are pure substring FPs (REJECT); 2 of 7 are domain-mismatched (WEAK); 1 of 7 is topically real but post-dates the items it anchors (LATE). 1 of 5 audited name_match anchors is FP (wasp). At least 46 of 60 strong items have suspect idea_at attributions.
rejected_name_match: 3191 wasp (Tarantula Hawk Wasp insect, not framework)

summary.method: Per strong-band portfolio item, join ChatGPT idea_at (earliest convo title-substring match; cluster seed-term fallback w/ idea_via tag) + CC build_at (earliest session first_user_msg substring) + fs ship_at (ctime by name+surface) + fs last_active_at (mtime). Lags in days. Deterministic flow_pattern: parallel if |lag_idea_to_build| <= 7d, else talk_leads/build_leads by sign, no_talk if no ChatGPT, no_build if ChatGPT-only. Caveat 'substring_fp_risk' on cluster_fallback ideas in audio_music or productivity_skills.
headline_findings_eyeball: talk_leads == no_build (27 vs 27): for every item where ChatGPT precedes CC by >7d, there's another where ChatGPT chatter exists but no CC session ever named the item in its first user message.
parallel cluster (4 items) all post-2026-02 (POLARIS, STRUDEL, mandelbulb3d, anatomy-extension) — once CC was online, talk+build genuinely co-arose.
no_talk = 2 (binre, everything-claude-code) — both 2026-05 CC-era builds with no cluster match in portfolio_evidence.json clusters; pure build_leads signal.

audio_music FP-risk caveats (5/7) all rely on substring 'stem' matching 'system'/'ecosystem' in 2024 ChatGPT titles — idea_at dates for airwindows/nih-plug/operator-system/STEMai/surge-xt are NOT trustworthy without verifying the convo content.
STEMai matched its own name via 'stem' seed — genuine but still flagged because cluster_fallback path can't distinguish name-collision from category match.
